hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$(dirname "$FILE")" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; *.py) python -m black --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac; fi
echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files directly — they contain secrets and are gitignored. Ask the user to update environment variables manually.' >&2 && exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Ask the user for explicit confirmation before running destructive operations.' >&2 && exit 2
